title: Master Shaper
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Master|more=Shaper (disambiguation)}}
'''Master Shaper''' was a rank of the [[Shaper caste]]. Once an adept was [[Escalation|escalated]] to Master, they would sacrifice one—or both—of their hands, and replace them with [[Shaper hand]]s. Also, Masters were allowed to view the [[Sixth cortex|sixth]] and [[Seventh cortex|seventh]] cortexes of [[Shaping protocol]]s. Master Shapers were denied one form of shaping—that of parenthood. They were supposed to be above the carnal, and could not take mates. Master Shapers were also distinguished by full-body [[oozhith]]s. [[Mezhan Kwaad]] and [[Nagme]] were Master Shapers.

Over [[137 ABY|one hundred years]] after the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], [[Nei Rin]] held the rank of Master Shaper, and attempted to use her abilities to help restore both worlds ravaged during the War and the Vong reputation in the [[Ossus Project]].

{{Stub}}
